race.comment: CHOUXDINO (1) resumed at Werribee improved and then knuckled down strongly to get within 0.8 lengths of the winner over 1600m at Ararat. Maps for a soft run and Yendall stays aboard. Strips fitter and he can go one better. CITY WOK (3) has been busting to win at the provincials over this distance. Suited and the in-form Gordon is reunited. STAR OF RAVENNA (7) led from the 13 gate at Horsham first-up and was only beaten a half-length. She led and was narrowly beaten at her only try over 1600m and is further improved. SKYDREAM (11) has been racing in stronger Maidens. Keeps John Allen and will be hitting the line.
